form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up came from midfield; finished fifth of 13 runners at Hereford on February 22 over 3200m, slow track; 15 len behind Just A Glance with 72.5kg at $23. Second-up favourite; won by 14 len Kempton Park on March 14 over 3200m defeating Shutfrontdoor carrying 70kg at $3 in a hurdle. Has been racing well. Big chance again.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth of 11 runners at Stratford-On-Avon on March 28 over 3300m, 45 len behind Watamu with 71kg at $21. The start before that; finished fourth of 7 runners at Kempton Park on March 14 over 3200m, 50 len behind Molten Sea with 70kg at $10. Rates well. Best efforts measure up and shouldn?t be far away.

form.formComment: Freshened for 29 days. Last start finished 14th of 20 runners at Cheltenham in the G1 Triumph Hurdle on March 13 over 3400m, slow track; 28 len behind Apolon De Charnie with 67.5kg at $81. The run before made some head-way from midfield; finished sixth of 10 starters at Cheltenham in the G2 Finesse Juvenile Novices' Hurdle on January 24 over 3400m, on slow going 13 len behind Maestro Conti carrying 69kg at $10. Can improve sharply.
